raw:
I will read the contents of `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` to understand the current implementation of keybindings, states, and the dialog layout.
I have verified the code builds and the existing logic and foreman tests run successfully. I'm ready to write the completion report.

## Completed
Reworked the keybindings in `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` to improve note-editing and cursor navigation inside choices.

Key decisions and changes:
- Removed Arrow Left/Right (`ŌåÉ`/`ŌåÆ`) question-tab switching completely, allowing these keys to be free for moving the text cursor inside a choice note input.
- Bound `Tab` to cycle to the NEXT question in both options-mode and note-editing mode (saving the note first).
- Bound `e` key to add or edit a per-choice note for the currently focused choice (when focused row is a real option, not Custom answer).
- Bound `Esc` to save the active note and return to options mode.
- Removed the note input's `onSubmit` assignment and the Enter key handler inside note mode so `Enter` no longer exits the note editor.
- Replaced `cycleFocusedArea` method with `goToNextQuestion()` and `openFocusedChoiceNote()`.
- Updated the help text bar to accurately describe the new mapping.
- All functional logic exports in `logic.ts` were kept completely unchanged and preserved, so no tests were broken.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` - keybinding layout updates and helper method changes (`cycleFocusedArea` -> `goToNextQuestion` / `openFocusedChoiceNote`).

## How To Verify
Run the validation script and unit tests:
```bash
bash extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh
grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh
```
